# Compute & Containers Icons

## Compute (`#ED7100`)

### resourceIcon (service-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.<resIcon>`
Required: `fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=#ffffff`

| Display Name | resIcon |
|---|---|
| Compute | `compute` |
| EC2 | `ec2` |
| EC2 Auto Scaling | `auto_scaling2` |
| Auto Scaling | `auto_scaling3` |
| App Runner | `app_runner` |
| Batch | `batch` |
| Bottlerocket | `bottlerocket` |
| Compute Optimizer | `compute_optimizer` |
| Elastic Beanstalk | `elastic_beanstalk` |
| Elastic Fabric Adapter | `elastic_fabric_adapter` |
| Elastic Load Balancing | `elastic_load_balancing` |
| EC2 Image Builder | `ec2_image_builder` |
| Fargate | `fargate` |
| Lambda | `lambda` |
| Lightsail | `lightsail` |
| Local Zones | `local_zones` |
| Nitro Enclaves | `nitro_enclaves` |
| Outposts Family | `outposts_family` |
| Outposts rack | `outposts` |
| Outposts Servers | `outposts_1u_and_2u_servers` |
| Parallel Cluster | `parallel_cluster` |
| Parallel Computing Service | `parallel_computing_service` |
| Serverless Application Repository | `serverless_application_repository` |
| SimSpace Weaver | `simspace_weaver` |
| VMware Cloud on AWS | `vmware_cloud_on_aws` |
| Wavelength | `wavelength` |

### Dedicated shapes (resource-level)

Use pattern: `shape=mxgraph.aws4.<shape>`
Required: `fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none` (dark silhouette on orange)

| Display Name | shape |
|---|---|
| Lambda Function | `lambda_function` |
| Instance | `instance2` |
| Instances | `instances` |
| Instance with CloudWatch | `instance_with_cloudwatch2` |
| AMI Resource | `ami` |
| Auto Scaling | `auto_scaling2` |
| DB on Instance | `db_on_instance2` |
| Elastic IP Address | `elastic_ip_address` |
| Spot Instance | `spot_instance` |
| Elastic Beanstalk Application | `application` |
| Deployment | `deployment` |
| Inferentia | `inferentia` |

#### EC2 Instance Types (selected)

| Display Name | shape |
|---|---|
| A1 Instance | `a1_instance` |
| C5 Instance | `c5_instance` |
| M5 Instance | `m5_instance` |
| R5 Instance | `r5_instance` |
| T3 Instance | `t3_instance` |
| T4g Instance | `t4g_instance` |
| P3 Instance | `p3_instance` |
| G4dn Instance | `g4dn` |
| Mac Instance | `mac_instance` |
| High Memory Instance | `high_memory_instance` |
| Trainium Instance | `trainium_instance` |

| ECS Anywhere | `ecs_anywhere` |
| EKS Anywhere | `eks_anywhere` |
| EKS Cloud | `eks_cloud` |

| Elastic Container Registry | `ecr` |
| Elastic Container Service | `ecs` |

| Red Hat OpenShift | `red_hat_openshift` |

| Image | `container_registry_image` |
